prompt: Catalog all the actions/endpoints described by the EARS specifications in the docs/ears/ directory (including the member/ subfolder). I want one table listing each action/endpoint, its module, the source file, and the spec it came from. Save the catalog to docs/ears/EARS-Action-Endpoint-Catalog.md.

assertions.text: Output catalog markdown file was produced
Table has the four required columns
All four EARS specs under docs/ears/ (GroupCreation, MemberAdmissionApproval, MemberDomain, MemberManagement-Resolved) appear in the Originating EARS File column
Every input's entry-point source files appear in the Source Code Reference column (check_catalog.py passes with all four inputs)
No row is missing a Source Code Reference
The directory was globbed recursively (member/ subfolder specs included)
